titles.title: There a healer in the house

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Now the Word says the Holy Healer He was passing by one day There was a man who was afflicted but he had the faith to say: If I can ever get to Jesus my healing will be the proof If I can't get through the door I'll tear of the roof Because there is a healer in the house today

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is a healer in the house today And for you He wants to make a way So just ask and believe by faith receive There is a healer in the house today

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a healer in the house today And for you He wants to make a way So just ask and believe by faith receive There is a healer in the house today

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now if you're sick or you're feeling lonely I'll have good news to bring For this healer His name is Jesus And He is the King of all kings He rides of the wind of mercy and there is healing in His wings So take the roof off the doubts let your faith come on out Cause there's a Healer in this house today

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is a healer in the house today And for you He wants to make a way So just ask and believe by faith receive There is a healer in the house today

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There is a healer in the house today And for you He wants to make a way So just ask and believe by faith receive There is a healer in the house today
